rationale: This is the Python equivalent of the Node clean-pass case (03 in v1). A minimal FastAPI service with one `/health` endpoint, one happy-path pytest test, and idiomatic project layout. Every Python-applicable layer in the pipeline runs and passes: imports resolve, no stub bodies, all third-party imports declared in requirements.txt, no APIRouter double-mount (no prefix at all in this case), import casing matches everywhere, pytest collects and runs the test green. The bench's purpose for this case: prove that the validator doesn't false-FAIL on healthy code. A clean run produces a clean PASS verdict; any failure in this case indicates a regression in one of the layers.

baseline_comparison.Aegis: PASS — all 6 applicable layers report passed; the rest are correctly skipped for stack mismatch or because LLM is disabled.
